start.speaker: Bert
start.text: Shh... quiet. The fish can hear you, you know.

after_shush.speaker: Bert
after_shush.text: Hmm? Oh, sorry. Old habit. What do you want?

choices.text: Can you teach me to fish?

fishing_lesson.speaker: Bert
fishing_lesson.text: Fishing is patience and instinct in equal measure. Cast your line, wait for the tug, then reel it in before it escapes. Simple. Well — simple to say.

lesson_tip.speaker: Bert
lesson_tip.text: Crystal Lake to the east has the best fish. Come back when you've caught something worth bragging about.

contest_info.speaker: Bert
contest_info.text: Aye, the annual Ashvale Fishing Contest. Catch the biggest and rarest fish you can. Bring me a Golden Bass and you'll have my respect — and a prize.

contest_start.speaker: Bert
contest_start.text: Golden Bass are rare — you'll need patience and a bit of luck. Best spot is Crystal Lake at dawn.
